info.title: DeciGraph API
info.description: Decision memory layer for AI agent teams. DeciGraph provides shared memory, context compilation, contradiction detection, and decision tracking for multi-agent AI systems.

get.description: Returns server status. No authentication required.

post.description: Create a new decision that supersedes this one.
Restore a superseded decision to active status.
Mark a decision as validated, activating 30-day temporal decay half-life.
Clear validation and optionally downgrade confidence.
Validate multiple decisions in a single transaction.
Compile relevant decisions into a context package for an agent.
Extract decisions from a conversation transcript using LLM.
Full project scan for conflicting decisions.
Submit relevance feedback for a decision in a context compilation.
Import conversation transcripts for decision extraction.
Send a test payload to verify the webhook URL.

get.description: Export a complete JSON snapshot of the project. Webhook URLs are redacted and secrets are never included.

post.description: Import a project from a JSON export. Creates a new project with ' (imported)' suffix.
